title: Section 39
content: 1[39. Application of sections 5 and 12 of Limitation Act, 1963.--The provisions of sections 5 and 12 of the Limitation Act, 1963 (36 of 1963), shall, so far as may be, apply to appeals under section 37 and section 38.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 29, ibid., for section 39 (w.e.f. 31-1-1974).
